metadata.significance: Opens with oath by dawn, tells of destroyed nations, and describes the peaceful soul

translations.en_sahih: By the dawn
translations.en_yusufali: By the break of Day
translations.ms_basmeih: Demi waktu fajar;

translations.en_sahih: And [by] ten nights
translations.en_yusufali: By the Nights twice five;
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan malam yang sepuluh (yang mempunyai kelebihan di sisi Allah);

translations.en_sahih: And [by] the even [number] and the odd
translations.en_yusufali: By the even and odd (contrasted);
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan bilangan yang genap serta yang ganjil;

translations.en_sahih: And [by] the night when it passes,
translations.en_yusufali: And by the Night when it passeth away;-
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan malam, apabila ia berlalu; -

ayahs.arabic: هَلْ فِى ذَٰلِكَ قَسَمٌ لِّذِى حِجْرٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Hal fee thalika qasamun lithee hijrin

translations.en_sahih: Is there [not] in [all] that an oath [sufficient] for one of perception?
translations.en_yusufali: Is there (not) in these an adjuration (or evidence) for those who understand?
translations.ms_basmeih: Bukankah yang demikian itu mengandungi sumpah (yang diakui kebenarannya) oleh orang yang berakal sempurna?

ayahs.arabic: أَلَمْ تَرَ كَيْفَ فَعَلَ رَبُّكَ بِعَادٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Alam tara kayfa faAAala rabbuka biAAadin

translations.en_sahih: Have you not considered how your Lord dealt with 'Aad -
translations.en_yusufali: Seest thou not how thy Lord dealt with the 'Ad (people),-
translations.ms_basmeih: (Kami tetap akan membinasakan orang-orang yang menentangmu wahai Muhammad), tidakkah engkau perhatikan, bagaimana Tuhanmu telah melakukan terhadap kaum Aad (yang kufur derhaka)

translations.en_sahih: [With] Iram - who had lofty pillars,
translations.en_yusufali: Of the (city of) Iram, with lofty pillars,
translations.ms_basmeih: Iaitu penduduk "Iram" yang mempunyai bangunan-bangunan yang tinggi tiangnya, (sesuai dengan penduduknya)

ayahs.arabic: ٱلَّتِى لَمْ يُخْلَقْ مِثْلُهَا فِى ٱلْبِلَـٰدِ
ayahs.transliteration: Allatee lam yukhlaq mithluha fee albiladi

translations.en_sahih: The likes of whom had never been created in the land?
translations.en_yusufali: The like of which were not produced in (all) the land?
translations.ms_basmeih: Yang belum pernah diciptakan sepertinya (tentang besar dan kukuhnya) di segala negeri (pada zamannya)?

translations.en_sahih: And [with] Thamud, who carved out the rocks in the valley?
translations.en_yusufali: And with the Thamud (people), who cut out (huge) rocks in the valley?-
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan (terhadap) kaum Thamud yang memahat batu-batu besar di lembah (Wadil-Qura iaitu tempat tinggalnya)?

translations.en_sahih: And [with] Pharaoh, owner of the stakes? -
translations.en_yusufali: And with Pharaoh, lord of stakes?
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan (terhadap) Firaun yang menguasai bangunan-bangunan yang handal kukuh?

translations.en_sahih: [All of] whom oppressed within the lands
translations.en_yusufali: (All) these transgressed beyond bounds in the lands,
translations.ms_basmeih: (Semuanya itu ialah) orang-orang yang telah bermaharajalela di negeri (masing-masing).

translations.en_sahih: And increased therein the corruption.
translations.en_yusufali: And heaped therein mischief (on mischief).
translations.ms_basmeih: Lalu mereka melakukan dengan banyaknya kerosakan dan bencana di negeri-negeri itu.

translations.en_sahih: So your Lord poured upon them a scourge of punishment.
translations.en_yusufali: Therefore did thy Lord pour on them a scourge of diverse chastisements:
translations.ms_basmeih: Dengan yang demikian, Tuhanmu mencurahkan ke atas mereka berbagai paluan azab;

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, your Lord is in observation.
translations.en_yusufali: For thy Lord is (as a Guardian) on a watch-tower.
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya Tuhanmu tetap mengawas dan membalas, (terutama balasan akhirat)

ayahs.arabic: فَأَمَّا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ إِذَا مَا ٱبْتَلَىٰهُ رَبُّهُۥ فَأَكْرَمَهُۥ وَنَعَّمَهُۥ فَيَقُولُ رَبِّىٓ أَكْرَمَنِ
ayahs.transliteration: Faamma alinsanu itha ma ibtalahu rabbuhu faakramahu wanaAAAAamahu fayaqoolu rabbee akramani

translations.en_sahih: And as for man, when his Lord tries him and [thus] is generous to him and favors him, he says, "My Lord has honored me."
translations.en_yusufali: Now, as for man, when his Lord trieth him, giving him honour and gifts, then saith he, (puffed up), "My Lord hath honoured me."
translations.ms_basmeih: (Dalam pada itu manusia tidak menghiraukan balasan akhirat), oleh yang demikian, maka kebanyakan manusia apabila diuji oleh Tuhannya dengan dimuliakan dan dimewahkan hidupnya, (ia tidak mahu bersyukur tetapi terus bersikap takbur) serta berkata dengan sombongnya: "Tuhanku telah memuliakan daku!"

ayahs.arabic: وَأَمَّآ إِذَا مَا ٱبْتَلَىٰهُ فَقَدَرَ عَلَيْهِ رِزْقَهُۥ فَيَقُولُ رَبِّىٓ أَهَـٰنَنِ
ayahs.transliteration: Waamma itha ma ibtalahu faqadara AAalayhi rizqahu fayaqoolu rabbee ahanani

translations.en_sahih: But when He tries him and restricts his provision, he says, "My Lord has humiliated me."
translations.en_yusufali: But when He trieth him, restricting his subsistence for him, then saith he (in despair), "My Lord hath humiliated me!"
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan sebaliknya apabila ia diuji oleh Tuhannya, dengan disempitkan rezekinya, (ia tidak bersabar bahkan ia resah gelisah) serta merepek dengan katanya: "Tuhanku telah menghinakan daku!"

translations.en_sahih: No! But you do not honor the orphan
translations.en_yusufali: Nay, nay! but ye honour not the orphans!
translations.ms_basmeih: Jangan demikian, (sebenarnya kata-kata kamu itu salah). Bahkan (perbuatan kamu wahai orang-orang yang hidup mewah, lebih salah lagi kerana) kamu tidak memuliakan anak yatim, (malah kamu menahan apa yang Ia berhak menerimanya);

translations.en_sahih: And you do not encourage one another to feed the poor.
translations.en_yusufali: Nor do ye encourage one another to feed the poor!-
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan kamu tidak menggalakkan untuk memberi makanan (yang berhak diterima oleh) orang miskin;

translations.en_sahih: And you consume inheritance, devouring [it] altogether,
translations.en_yusufali: And ye devour inheritance - all with greed,
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan kamu sentiasa makan harta pusaka secara rakus (dengan tidak membezakan halal haramnya),

translations.en_sahih: And you love wealth with immense love.
translations.en_yusufali: And ye love wealth with inordinate love!
translations.ms_basmeih: Serta kamu pula sayangkan harta secara tamak haloba!

ayahs.arabic: كَلَّآ إِذَا دُكَّتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ دَكًّا دَكًّا
ayahs.transliteration: Kalla itha dukkati alardu dakkan dakkan

translations.en_sahih: No! When the earth has been leveled - pounded and crushed -
translations.en_yusufali: Nay! When the earth is pounded to powder,
translations.ms_basmeih: Jangan sekali-kali bersikap demikian! (Sebenarnya) apabila bumi (dihancurkan segala yang ada di atasnya dan) diratakan serata-ratanya,

translations.en_sahih: And your Lord has come and the angels, rank upon rank,
translations.en_yusufali: And thy Lord cometh, and His angels, rank upon rank,
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan (perintah) Tuhanmu pun datang, sedang malaikat berbaris-baris (siap sedia menjalankan perintah),

ayahs.arabic: وَجِا۟ىٓءَ يَوْمَئِذٍۭ بِجَهَنَّمَ ۚ يَوْمَئِذٍ يَتَذَكَّرُ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ وَأَنَّىٰ لَهُ ٱلذِّكْرَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Wajeea yawmaithin bijahannama yawmaithin yatathakkaru alinsanu waanna lahu alththikra

translations.en_sahih: And brought [within view], that Day, is Hell - that Day, man will remember, but what good to him will be the remembrance?
translations.en_yusufali: And Hell, that Day, is brought (face to face),- on that Day will man remember, but how will that remembrance profit him?
translations.ms_basmeih: Serta diperlihatkan neraka Jahannam pada hari itu, (maka) pada saat itu manusia akan ingat (hendak berlaku baik), dan bagaimana ingatan itu akan berguna lagi kepadanya?

translations.en_sahih: He will say, "Oh, I wish I had sent ahead [some good] for my life."
translations.en_yusufali: He will say: "Ah! Would that I had sent forth (good deeds) for (this) my (Future) Life!"
translations.ms_basmeih: Ia akan berkata: "Alangkah baiknya kalau aku dahulu sediakan amal-amal baik untuk hidupku (di sini)!"

translations.en_sahih: So on that Day, none will punish [as severely] as His punishment,
translations.en_yusufali: For, that Day, His Chastisement will be such as none (else) can inflict,
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka pada hari itu tiada sesiapapun yang dapat menyeksa seperti azab (yang ditimpakan oleh) Allah.

translations.en_sahih: And none will bind [as severely] as His binding [of the evildoers].
translations.en_yusufali: And His bonds will be such as none (other) can bind.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan tiada sesiapapun yang dapat mengikat serta membelenggu seperti ikatan dan belengguNya.

translations.en_sahih: [To the righteous it will be said], "O reassured soul,
translations.en_yusufali: (To the righteous soul will be said:) "O (thou) soul, in (complete) rest and satisfaction!
translations.ms_basmeih: (Setelah menerangkan akibat orang-orang yang tidak menghiraukan akhirat, Tuhan menyatakan bahawa orang-orang yang beriman dan beramal soleh akan disambut dengan kata-kata): "Wahai orang yang mempunyai jiwa yang sentiasa tenang tetap dengan kepercayaan dan bawaan baiknya! -

translations.en_sahih: Return to your Lord, well-pleased and pleasing [to Him],
translations.en_yusufali: "Come back thou to thy Lord,- well pleased (thyself), and well-pleasing unto Him!
translations.ms_basmeih: "Kembalilah kepada Tuhanmu dengan keadaan engkau berpuas hati (dengan segala nikmat yang diberikan) lagi diredhai (di sisi Tuhanmu) ! -

translations.en_sahih: And enter among My [righteous] servants
translations.en_yusufali: "Enter thou, then, among My devotees!
translations.ms_basmeih: "Serta masuklah engkau dalam kumpulan hamba-hambaku yang berbahagia -

translations.en_sahih: And enter My Paradise."
translations.en_yusufali: "Yea, enter thou My Heaven!
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan masuklah ke dalam SyurgaKu! "
